question: If a person wants to get the attention of the man in the suit and tie standing on the sidelines, where should they look? Select from the following options: (A) Towards the front row of the crowd. (B) At the opposite side of the court. (C) Near the center of the court. (D) At the back row of the crowd.
gold_answer: Near the center of the court
answer_choices: Towards the front row of the crowd
At the opposite side of the court
Near the center of the court
At the back row of the crowd

qwen_prompt_object.inpaint_prompt: A basketball player in mid-air dunking near the center of the court
